Looking at the task "fix: packages", I can see there are version mismatches and potential issues in the package.json file. The main issues I can identify are:

1. `zod` is using version `^4.1.12` which doesn't exist - the latest stable version is 3.x
2. Some package versions might need alignment

Let me fix the package versions:

```diff
diff --git a/apps/web-app/package.json b/apps/web-app/package.json

```diff
diff --git a/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/plan.md b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/plan.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/plan.md
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+# Clients Page Implementation Plan
+
+## Overview
+Build a comprehensive clients management page that allows businesses to view, search, filter, and analyze their client data with detailed statistics and interaction history.
+
+## Goals
+- Create a full-featured clients data table with search and filtering
+- Display client statistics and metrics
+- Show client interaction history and appointment data
+- Provide client management actions (edit, view details)
+- Follow existing design patterns from users page
+
+## Implementation Steps
+
+### 1. Backend Implementation
+
+#### 1.1 Repository Layer
+- Implement `IClientRepository` interface methods
+- Add client search, filtering, and statistics queries
+- Include appointment count and last visit data
+
+#### 1.2 Use Cases
+- `GetClientsByBusiness` - List clients for a business with filters
+- `GetClientDetail` - Get detailed client information
+- `GetClientStats` - Calculate client statistics
+
+#### 1.3 tRPC Router
+- Create `client.router.ts` with procedures:
+  - `getByBusiness` - List clients with search/filter
+  - `getDetail` - Get client details
+  - `getStats` - Get client statistics
+
+### 2. Frontend Implementation
+
+#### 2.1 Client Components
+- `ClientStats` - Display client metrics cards
+- `ClientList` - Data table with real data from API
+- `ClientDetailDialog` - Modal for viewing/editing client details
+
+#### 2.2 Client Page
+- Create `/clients` page similar to `/users` page structure
+- Include search, filters, and statistics
+- Implement real data fetching and mutations
+
+#### 2.3 Navigation Updates
+- Ensure clients link is properly configured in sidebar
+- Add appropriate permissions and business context checks
+
+### 3. Data Structure
+
+#### Client Data Model
+```typescript
+interface Client {
+  id: string
+  name: string
+  email: string
+  phone: string | null
+  avatar: string | null
+  appointmentsCount: number
+  lastVisit: Date | null
+  totalSpent: number
+  status: 'active' | 'inactive'
+  createdAt: Date
+  updatedAt: Date
+}
+```
+
+#### Statistics Model
+```typescript
+interface ClientStats {
+  totalClients: number
+  activeClients: number
+  newThisMonth: number
+  averageAppointments: number
+  retentionRate: number
+}
+```
+
+## Success Criteria
+- [ ] Clients page loads with real data from database
+- [ ] Search and filtering work correctly
+- [ ] Statistics display accurate numbers
+- [ ] Client detail modal shows comprehensive information
+- [ ] Page follows existing design patterns and UI consistency
+- [ ] Performance is optimized with proper pagination
+- [ ] Error handling is implemented throughout
+- [ ] Loading states are shown appropriately
+- [ ] Mobile responsive design works correctly
diff --git a/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/references.md b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/references.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/references.md
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+# Implementation References
+
+## Existing Patterns to Follow
+
+### 1. Users Page Structure
+- Location: `apps/web-app/src/app/(private)/users/page.tsx`
+- Pattern: Stats cards + filters + data table + modals
+- Components: Search, filters, pagination, action modals
+- State management: tRPC queries with React Query
+
+### 2. Repository Pattern
+- Example: `PrismaUserRepository.ts`
+- Interface: Define repository interface in domain layer
+- Implementation: Prisma-based repository in infrastructure layer
+- Methods: CRUD operations, search, filtering, statistics
+
+### 3. Use Case Pattern
+- Examples: User use cases in `use-cases/user/`
+- Structure: Input validation, business logic, repository calls
+- Error handling: Result pattern with success/error states
+- Transaction management for complex operations
+
+### 4. tRPC Router Pattern
+- Example: `user.router.ts`
+- Procedures: Input validation with Zod schemas
+- Authentication: Use appropriate procedures (private, businessMember)
+- Error handling: TRPCError with proper codes
+
+### 5. Component Architecture
+- Stats: Follow `StatCard` and `StatsGrid` patterns
+- Tables: Use `DataTableWithFilters` component
+- Modals: Follow dialog patterns from users page
+- Forms: Use shadcn/ui form components with validation
+
+## Key Dependencies
+
+### Backend
+- `@trpc/server` - API layer
+- `zod` - Input validation
+- `prisma` - Database operations
+
+### Frontend  
+- `@tanstack/react-query` - Data fetching and caching
+- `@trpc/react-query` - tRPC React integration
+- `shadcn/ui` - UI components
+- `lucide-react` - Icons
diff --git a/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/shape.md b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/shape.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/shape.md
@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+# Clients Page Shape Definition
+
+## Page Layout Structure
+
+```
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│ Header Section                                          │
+│ ┌─────────┐ Clients                                     │
+│ │ [Icon] │ Manage your client database                  │
+│ └─────────┘                                             │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│ Statistics Cards (4-column grid)                        │
+│ ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────┐ │
+│ │Total      │ │Active     │ │New This   │ │Retention  │ │
+│ │Clients    │ │Clients    │ │Month      │ │Rate       │ │
+│ │   156     │ │   142     │ │    18     │ │   87%     │ │
+│ └───────────┘ └───────────┘ └───────────┘ └───────────┘ │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│ Search & Filters Card                                   │
+│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
+│ │ Search: [________________________] [Status▼] [Clear]│ │
+│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│ Clients Data Table                                      │
+│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
+│ │ Client Name  │ Contact     │ Appts │ Last Visit │ ⋮  │ │
+│ │──────────────┼─────────────┼───────┼────────────┼───│ │
+│ │ John Doe     │ john@...    │   12  │ 2024-10-20 │ ⋮  │ │
+│ │ Jane Smith   │ jane@...    │    8  │ 2024-10-22 │ ⋮  │ │
+│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
+│ Pagination: [< 1 2 3 ... 10 >]                         │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+```
+
+## Component Breakdown
+
+### 1. Header Section
+- Icon (UserCheck)
+- Title: "Clients"
+- Subtitle: "Manage your client database"
+
+### 2. Statistics Cards
+- **Total Clients**: Count of all clients
+- **Active Clients**: Clients with recent activity
+- **New This Month**: Clients added in current month
+- **Retention Rate**: Percentage of returning clients
+
+### 3. Search & Filters
+- **Search Input**: By name, email, phone
+- **Status Filter**: Active, Inactive, All
+- **Clear Filters Button**: Reset all filters
+
+### 4. Data Table Columns
+- **Client**: Avatar + Name + Email
+- **Phone**: Contact number
+- **Appointments**: Total appointment count
+- **Last Visit**: Date of most recent appointment
+- **Total Spent**: Lifetime value (if payment data available)
+- **Status**: Active/Inactive badge
+- **Actions**: Menu with Edit, View Details, Delete options
+
+## Interactive Elements
+
+### Client Row Actions
+- **Edit**: Open edit client modal
+- **View Details**: Open detailed client modal with:
+  - Personal information
+  - Appointment history
+  - Payment history
+  - Notes and preferences
+- **Delete**: Confirmation dialog for client removal
+
+### Table Features
+- **Sorting**: By name, appointments, last visit, total spent
+- **Pagination**: Server-side with configurable page size
+- **Selection**: Multi-select for batch operations
+- **Responsive**: Mobile-friendly collapsed view
+
+## Loading & Error States
+
+### Loading States
+- Statistics: Skeleton cards with loading spinners
+- Table: Loading spinner with "Loading clients..." message
+
+### Error States
+- API errors: Error message with retry option
+- Empty state: "No clients found" with illustration
+- Network errors: Offline indicator with retry button
diff --git a/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/standards.md b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/standards.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/agent-os/specs/2026-04-23-1500-clients-table/standards.md
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+# Implementation Standards
+
+## Architecture Compliance
+
+### Hexagonal Architecture
+- **Domain Layer**: Core business logic in `src/server/core/domain/`
+- **Application Layer**: Use cases in `src/server/core/application/use-cases/`
+- **Infrastructure Layer**: Repositories in `src/server/infrastructure/repositories/`
+- **Presentation Layer**: tRPC routers and React components
+
+### Repository Pattern
+```typescript
+// Domain interface
+interface IClientRepository {
+  findByBusiness(businessId: string, options?: SearchOptions): Promise<Client[]>
+  findById(id: string): Promise<Client | null>
+  getStatsByBusiness(businessId: string): Promise<ClientStats>
+}
+
+// Infrastructure implementation
+class PrismaClientRepository implements IClientRepository {
+  // Implementation using Prisma
+}
+```
+
+## Code Quality Standards
+
+### TypeScript
+- Strict type checking enabled
+- No `any` types allowed
+- Proper interface definitions for all data structures
+- Generic types where appropriate
+
+### Error Handling
+- Use Result pattern for use cases
+- TRPCError for API layer errors
+- Proper error boundaries in React components
+- User-friendly error messages
+
+### Performance
+- Database query optimization with proper indexing
+- Pagination for large datasets
+- React Query caching strategies
+- Debounced search inputs
+
+## UI/UX Standards
+
+### Design System
+- Use shadcn/ui components consistently
+- Follow existing color scheme and spacing
+- Maintain typography hierarchy
+- Ensure dark mode compatibility
+
+### Accessibility
+- Proper ARIA labels and roles
+- Keyboard navigation support
+- Screen reader compatibility
+- Color contrast compliance
+
+### Responsive Design
+- Mobile-first approach
+- Breakpoint consistency with existing pages
+- Touch-friendly interactive elements
+- Collapsible table design for mobile
+
+## Testing Standards
+
+### Unit Tests
+- Test all use cases with various scenarios
+- Mock external dependencies
+- Repository method testing
+- Component unit tests
+
+### Integration Tests
+- API endpoint testing
+- Database integration tests
+- End-to-end user flows
+
+## Security Standards
+
+### Data Access
+- Business-scoped data access only
+- Proper authentication checks
+- Input validation and sanitization
+- SQL injection prevention
+
+### Privacy
+- Client data protection
+- Audit logs for sensitive operations
+- GDPR compliance considerations
